name: FarmaForce Limited
summary: FarmaForce Limited provides services as a contract sales organization to pharmaceutical industry in Australia. The company operates in two segments, Contract Sales and Marketing Services to External Customers; and Services to Related Parties. It also offers sales, data, and medical affairs solutions. The company was founded in 2014 and is based in Sydney, Australia. FarmaForce Limited is a subsidiary of The iQ Group Global Ltd.
